items.label: Getting Started
items.content:
## Welcome!

**Welcome to ZYNQ!**

This library provides hundreds of games with rich metadata and thumbnails, alongside a separate WebRTC-powered social system for real-time interaction.

Choose your preferred way to install the library below.

items.label: Script Tag
items.content:
### Script Tag

Use this if you want the fastest setup via CDN.

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.0.8/index.min.js"></script>
```

items.label: ES Module
items.content:
### ES Module

For modern JavaScript projects (Vite, Webpack, etc).

```javascript
import { games, peer } from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.0.8/index.min.js"
```

items.label: Game Object
items.content:
## ZYNQ.games
### Game Object

A game object returned by `ZYNQ.games` methods.

```text
Game:
- name: string
- category?: string
- alias: string
- url: string
- thumb: string
- devices?: number[]

Computed:
- isSupported: boolean
- isFavorite: boolean
```

children.label: list
children.content:
### ZYNQ.games.list
Filtered array of games.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.list
```

children.label: total
children.content:
### ZYNQ.games.total
Total loaded games.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.total
```

children.label: filteredCount
children.content:
### ZYNQ.games.filteredCount
Number of visible games.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.filteredCount
```

children.label: history
children.content:
### ZYNQ.games.history
Recently played game aliases.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.history
```

children.label: favorites
children.content:
### ZYNQ.games.favorites
Favorite game aliases.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.favorites
```

children.label: .init()
children.content:
### init()
Initialize game system.

```javascript
await ZYNQ.games.init()
```

children.label: .search()
children.content:
### search()
Search games by name or alias.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.search("alien")
```

children.label: .random()
children.content:
### random()
Get random games.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.random(2)
```

children.label: .getRandomOne()
children.content:
### getRandomOne()
Get a single random game.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.getRandomOne()
```

children.label: .shuffle()
children.content:
### shuffle()
Shuffle current list.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.shuffle()
```

children.label: .sortBy()
children.content:
### sortBy()
Sort games by field.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.sortBy("name")
```

children.label: .sortByPopularity()
children.content:
### sortByPopularity()
Sort by popularity score.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
```

children.label: .getByAlias()
children.content:
### getByAlias()
Get a game by alias.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("alien-hominid")
```

children.label: .getByCategory()
children.content:
### getByCategory()
Filter games by category.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory("shooter")
```

children.label: .filterSupported()
children.content:
### filterSupported()
Keep only supported games.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.filterSupported()
```

children.label: .filterFavorites()
children.content:
### filterFavorites()
Keep only favorite games.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.filterFavorites()
```

children.label: .toggleFavorite()
children.content:
### toggleFavorite()
Toggle favorite state.

```javascript
ZYNQ.games.toggleFavorite("alien-hominid")
```

items.label: Example
items.content:
### Games Example

```javascript
await ZYNQ.games.init()

const results = ZYNQ.games
  .search("alien")
  .filterSupported()
  .sortBy("name")
  .list

console.log(results)
```

items.label: Options
items.content:
### Options

- video: boolean
- audio: boolean
- txt: boolean
- debug: boolean
- rateLimit: number
- maxMsgSize: number
- autoReconnect: boolean
- maxReconnectAttempts: number

children.label: .connect()
children.content:
### connect()
Connect to another peer.

```javascript
PeerInstance.connect("peer-id")
```

children.label: .send()
children.content:
### send()
Send data to peer.

```javascript
PeerInstance.send("hello")
```

children.label: .getStream()
children.content:
### getStream()
Get media stream.

```javascript
await PeerInstance.getStream()
```

children.label: .close()
children.content:
### close()
Close connection.

```javascript
PeerInstance.close()
```

children.label: .destroy()
children.content:
### destroy()
Destroy peer instance.

```javascript
PeerInstance.destroy()
```

children.label: open
children.content:
### open event

```javascript
PeerInstance.on("open", id => {})
```

children.label: data
children.content:
### data event

```javascript
PeerInstance.on("data", msg => {})
```

children.label: stream
children.content:
### stream event

```javascript
PeerInstance.on("stream", stream => {})
```

children.label: close
children.content:
### close event

```javascript
PeerInstance.on("close", () => {})
```

children.label: error
children.content:
### error event

```javascript
PeerInstance.on("error", err => {})
```
